title: Contract No. 32500082 Amendment: Telegraph Property and Business Management Corporation

sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution amending the Contract No. 32500082 contract with the Telegraph
Property and Business Management Corporation, commonly known as the Telegraph
Business Improvement District, for the janitorial maintenance of the new 24 hour, 7 days
a week (24/7), public restroom with a new not to exceed amount of $150,000 and
extend the contract through June 30, 2026.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
Funding is available in the General Fund in the amount of $105,000 in FY2025 and
future funding in FY2026 as part of the adopted budget. It is anticipated that the amount
of $45,000 will be included as part of Annual Appropriations Ordinance #2.
sections.current_situation:
Public Works has contracted with the Telegraph Property and Business Management
Corporation (commonly known as the Telegraph Business Improvement District (TBID))
for the janitorial services for the public restroom on Channing Way near the intersection
with Telegraph Avenue.
In 2018, the City initiated a Citywide Restroom Study1, which was completed in 2020.
The study’s recommendations included the design and construction of three new public
restrooms. The Telegraph-Channing location is the first of these restrooms to be
constructed, with the other two, Alcatraz-Adeline & San Pablo-University, starting
construction in Spring 2025.
As part of the FY 2024 Two-Year Budget process, $210,000 ($105,000 for FY25 and
$105,000 for FY26) of funds from the General Fund was approved for the maintenance
of the public restroom.
1 https://berkeleyca.gov/your-government/our-work/capital-projects/citywide-restroom-assessment-project
2180 Milvia Street, Berkeley, CA 94704 ● Tel: (510) 981-7000 ● TDD: (510) 981-6903 ● Fax: (510) 981-7099
E-Mail: manager@berkeleyca.gov Website: https://berkeleyca.gov/
Page 2 of 3
Contract No. 32500082 Amendment: Telegraph Property and CONSENT CALENDAR
Business Management Corporation and Request for Maintenance Funding February, 25, 2025
Amending the contract with the servicing of the public restroom is a Strategic Plan
Priority Project, advancing our goal to provide state-of-the-art, well-maintained
infrastructure, amenities, and facilities.
sections.background:
TBID was selected through a sole source agreement in January of 2023 in advance of
the completion of the restroom which was anticipated in April 2023. The original contract
has an initial start date of July 1, 2024, but construction delays prevented the
implementation of this contract until January 2025 as the contractor prepared for the
opening of the restroom to the public.
TBID is currently best suited to oversee this work as they have Ambassadors that will
assist in monitoring the status of the restrooms. The cleaning will be handled by their
subcontractor which is currently maintaining the restroom inside the Telegraph
Channing Garage. The cleaning subcontractor will be responsible for cleaning and
inspecting the restroom 3 times a day 24/7 and will have easy access to their supplies
within the Telegraph Channing Garage. There are no City staff able to complete this
work. Additionally, coordinating with TBID was a recommendation of the Citywide
Restroom Study as TBID has Ambassadors that are readily able to report issues to the
City.
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
Providing ongoing janitorial service for a 24/7 public restroom will keep the restroom
open and usable by the community. Public restrooms may help reduce open defecation
which impacts stormwater and public health. There are no identifiable climate impacts.
sections.rationale: Amending the existing contract is the most efficient and effective use of City resources.
sections.alternatives:
There are two additional 24/7 restrooms that are currently in the design phase, with
construction anticipated in late 2025. When construction begins, PW will review the
janitorial services required and evaluate whether or not continuation of this contract
makes operational and financial sense, or if there is an alternate vendor available
through a competitive process.
CONTACT PERSON
Joy Brown, Operations Manager, Public Works, 510-981-6629
Aaron Baker, Superintendent, Public Works, 510-981-6452
Peni Basalusalu, Deputy Director, Public Works, 510-981-6485
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
CONTRACT NO. 32500082 AMENDMENT: TELEGRAPH PROPERTY AND
BUSINESS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION
WHEREAS, Public Works has contracted with the Telegraph Property and Business
Management Corporation (commonly known as the Telegraph Business Improvement
District (TBID)) for the janitorial services for the public restroom on Channing Way near
the intersection with Telegraph Avenue; and
WHEREAS, funding is available in the General Fund for maintenance and janitorial
services in the baseline FY2025 budget and additional funding will be appropriated from
General Fund in FY2026; and
WHEREAS, the TBID is well positioned to manage the janitorial services and provide
additional support of notification of issues through their Ambassador Program; and
WHEREAS, the City requires the services of TBID to provide janitorial maintenance of
the public restroom on Channing Way at Telegraph Avenue.
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that
Amending the contract with the Telegraph Property and Business Management
Corporation, commonly known as the Telegraph Business Improvement District, for the
janitorial maintenance of the new 24/7 public restroom with a new not to exceed amount
of $150,000 and extend the contract through June 30, 2026.
